# Geo and topography

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: hide
here::i_am("atlas-mnhnl.Rproj")
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "Geology.R"))
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "SoilsMap.R"))
# source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "DSM.R"))
```


## Geology {.unnumbered}

```{r geology}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 20
#| fig-height: 20

plot_carte_geologique(uniteGeo, failles)
```

```{r geology LEGENDE}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 20
#| fig-height: 12

plot_legende_geologique(uniteGeo, cex_legende = 1.28)
```

<details>
<summary><strong> Show french legend description table</strong></summary>

```{r geology description fr}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
knitr::kable(tableau_unites)
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong> Show german legend description table</strong></summary>

```{r geology description de}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
knitr::kable(tableau_unites)
```

</details>


::: {.spacer}
:::



## Altitude {.unnumbered} 

<!-- # ```{r altitude} -->
<!-- # #| echo: false -->
<!-- # #| warning: false -->
<!-- # #| message: false -->
<!-- # carte_altitude(DATAPATH) -->
<!-- # ``` -->


## Soil {.unnumbered}

```{r soil}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 20
#| fig-height: 20

plot_carte_sols(DATAPATH)
```

```{r soil LEGENDE}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 20
#| fig-height: 15


plot_legende_sols(DATAPATH)
```
